Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Visiria]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Visiria is a place where Varic was a prize fighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Visiria is a continent in the southeastern part of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Visiria is a likely destination for an intervention.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Visiria is the location of the Prime Coliseum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Visiria is part of the Karoshan Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Visiria is a planet that is one of the major components of the Karoshan Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Visiria is largely independent from the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Visiria is a planet containing a jungle made of floating islands of plants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Visirian navy is not notable on a galactic scale.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The narrator does not want to fight Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Visiria is a location/faction that could potentially be brought to the side of the protagonists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — A potential alliance with Visiria is a goal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — The Titan Knight is supposed to be on Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Raion is working on the planet Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — Visiria is a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — Visiria is a major system that the Swarm-Queen might feed on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — A group of Perfected moved for Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Visiria is a planet with many ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The people of Visiria lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Visiria is a blue planet.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Visiria is a location in the Visiria system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Visiria is a planet that was attacked by the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Visiria is an important world with populations on every planet in its system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Vallenar Corporation is taking stock of assets on Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Zenith Starship attacked Visiria weeks prior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Visiria is a planet governed by Nelula Seiren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Visiria is a location outside of Galactic Union control that has access to the Union Subline.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
